title: Add AnchorBrowser — cloud browser platform for AI agents

entities.name: AnchorBrowser
entities.description: A cloud browser platform built specifically for AI agents, providing managed Chromium instances with stealth capabilities.

entities.name: AI Agents
entities.description: Software entities designed to automate tasks, for which AnchorBrowser provides a browsing platform.

entities.name: Chromium
entities.description: The open-source browser project that AnchorBrowser's managed instances are based on, featuring custom stealth capabilities.

entities.name: Puppeteer
entities.description: A Node.js library that provides a high-level API to control Chrome or Chromium over the DevTools Protocol, used to connect to AnchorBrowser.

entities.name: Playwright
entities.description: A Node.js library to automate Chromium, Firefox and WebKit with a single API, used to connect to AnchorBrowser.

entities.name: WebSocket
entities.description: A communication protocol providing full-duplex communication channels over a single TCP connection, used for connecting to AnchorBrowser.

entities.name: CDP
entities.description: Chrome DevTools Protocol, used for connecting to AnchorBrowser instances.

entities.name: Cloudflare
entities.description: A web infrastructure and website security company that verifies traffic, which AnchorBrowser's custom Chromium is designed to bypass as human.

entities.name: SSO
entities.description: Single Sign-On, a user authentication process that allows a user to access multiple applications with one set of login credentials, handled by AnchorBrowser.

entities.name: MFA
entities.description: Multi-Factor Authentication, a security system that requires more than one method of authentication from independent categories of credentials, handled by AnchorBrowser.

entities.name: Session Cookies
entities.description: Temporary cookies used to maintain user sessions, handled by AnchorBrowser across automation runs.

entities.name: MCP Server
entities.description: A native server provided by AnchorBrowser for various AI tools like Claude, GPT, and Cursor.

entities.name: Claude
entities.description: An AI tool supported by AnchorBrowser's native MCP server.

entities.name: GPT
entities.description: An AI tool supported by AnchorBrowser's native MCP server.

entities.name: Cursor
entities.description: An AI tool supported by AnchorBrowser's native MCP server.

entities.name: Batch Sessions
entities.description: A capability of AnchorBrowser allowing up to 5,000 concurrent browser instances.

entities.name: SOC2
entities.description: A compliance standard for service organizations, which AnchorBrowser is compliant with.

entities.name: ISO27001
entities.description: An international standard for information security management systems, which AnchorBrowser is compliant with.

entities.name: GDPR
entities.description: General Data Protection Regulation, a data privacy and security law, which AnchorBrowser is compliant with.

entities.name: HIPAA
entities.description: Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act, a US law protecting patient health information, which AnchorBrowser is compliant with.

relations.evidence: AnchorBrowser is a cloud browser platform built specifically for AI agents.

extracted_data.summary: AnchorBrowser is a cloud browser platform for AI agents, offering managed, stealthy Chromium instances with Puppeteer/Playwright connectivity, handling SSO/MFA, and providing compliance with SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, and HIPAA.
